title: eupatorium perfoliatum f. truncatum
intro: Eupatorium perfoliatum f. truncatum, also known as Joe Pye weed, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Eupatorium perfoliatum f. truncatum include relieving fever, reducing swelling, and soothing respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. This plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural healers.
